channel.title: Software Designer on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Software Designer on yexca'Blog

item.title: Software Designer - Operating System Notes
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash These notes were likely written around the same time as previous ones. Since the file creation time is past the exam date, it might have been created during a file move. The Role of Operating Systems A computer system consists of two parts: hardware and software. A computer without any software is often called “bare metal.” Using bare metal directly is not only inconvenient but also significantly reduces work efficiency and …

item.title: Software Designer - InfoSec Notes
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash This article was written around the same time as my Computer Networks notes . Both topics are usually covered together for the exam, so I studied them concurrently. Firewall Technology A firewall is a filtering and blocking mechanism deployed at the boundary between internal and external networks. It assumes the internal network is secure and trustworthy, while the external network is not. Its role is to prevent unwanted, …

item.title: Software Designer - Computer Networks Notes
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash You can tell from the image links these are my 2023-04 notes. I hadn’t posted them because they’re mostly just raw knowledge points, not a polished article. But they’re notes nonetheless, and it’s handy to have them on the blog for quick reference. 1. Network Devices Layer Device Isolates Broadcast Domain Isolates Collision Domain Physical Layer Repeater / Hub ✗ ✗ Data Link Layer Bridge / Switch ✗ ✓ Network Layer Router ✓ ✓ …
